Custom Banner Magnets for Steel & Metal Surface Mounting

Easily mount your banners with our professional Banner Magnets! No tools, nails, or complex installation required. These high-strength magnetic mounting solutions work perfectly for both indoor and outdoor banner installations on steel and metal surfaces.

Our Banner Magnets provide a secure 22-pound holding capacity per magnet, making them ideal for custom vinyl banners, fabric banners, and mesh banners up to 5 ft x 10 ft. Each magnet features durable construction designed for repeated use and repositioning.

Banner Magnets are sold in convenient 4-packs and include adhesive mounting plates for non-magnetic surfaces, providing versatile installation options for retail displays, trade shows, events, and professional signage applications.

Professional Banner Magnet Features

  • High-Strength Magnetic Hold: Each magnet holds up to 22 lbs for secure banner mounting
  • Optimal Banner Coverage: Perfect for banners up to 5 ft x 10 ft dimensions
  • Versatile Surface Mounting: Works on steel surfaces plus includes adhesive plates for non-magnetic mounting
  • Reusable Hardware: Durable construction allows for repeated installation and repositioning
  • Complete Installation Kit: Includes all hardware needed for professional banner mounting
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Hardware Material for Indoor & Outdoor Banner Installation

Our Banner Magnets are constructed with high-grade magnetic materials engineered for professional banner mounting applications. The strong magnetic core provides reliable holding power while maintaining durability for repeated use.

Banner Magnet Material Specifications

  • High-Strength Magnetic Core: Professional-grade magnetic material with 22-pound holding capacity
  • Weather-Resistant Construction: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor banner installations
  • Durable Housing: Protective casing prevents damage during installation and storage
  • Adhesive Mounting Plates: Industrial-strength adhesive backing for non-magnetic surface installation
  • Corrosion-Resistant Finish: Long-lasting performance in various environmental conditions

The magnetic hardware is designed to work seamlessly with grommeted banners, providing a secure connection point that won't damage your banner material. Compatible with vinyl banners, fabric banners, mesh banners, and other grommeted signage materials.

Banner Magnet Installation & Setup Instructions

Banner Magnets come complete with all necessary hardware for professional installation. Each 4-pack includes magnets, adhesive mounting plates, and detailed setup instructions for both magnetic and non-magnetic surfaces.

Installation Hardware Included

  • Magnetic Units: 4 high-strength magnetic mounting units per pack
  • Adhesive Mounting Plates: Industrial-strength plates for non-magnetic surface installation
  • Threaded Assembly: Secure screw-together design for reliable banner attachment
  • Setup Instructions: Complete installation guide with visual steps

Surface Compatibility

  • Steel and metal surfaces (direct magnetic mounting)
  • Non-magnetic surfaces using included adhesive plates
  • Indoor and outdoor installation locations
  • Smooth, clean surfaces for optimal adhesive bonding

The two-piece magnetic design allows for easy installation through banner grommets while providing maximum holding strength once assembled.

Professional Uses for Banner Magnetic Hardware

Banner Magnets provide versatile mounting solutions for professional signage applications across multiple industries and installation environments.

Commercial & Retail Applications

  • Store Displays: Mount promotional banners on metal fixtures and displays
  • Trade Show Booths: Quick banner installation on metal booth structures
  • Warehouse Signage: Safety and informational banners on steel surfaces
  • Restaurant Displays: Menu boards and promotional banners on metal surfaces

Industrial & Construction Uses

  • Construction Sites: Safety banners and signage on steel structures
  • Manufacturing Facilities: Process signs and safety banners on equipment
  • Vehicle Graphics: Temporary banner mounting on steel truck surfaces
  • Event Installations: Quick banner setup on metal frameworks

Indoor & Outdoor Installation

  • Steel building installations
  • Metal fence banner mounting
  • Equipment and machinery signage
  • Temporary promotional displays
  • Repositionable banner installations

The reusable nature of Banner Magnets makes them ideal for businesses requiring frequent signage updates or seasonal banner changes.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Magnet Installation Instructions

Banner Magnets are designed for easy installation with banners featuring standard grommet holes. Follow these steps for proper installation on both magnetic and non-magnetic surfaces.

Installation on Magnetic Surfaces (Steel/Metal)

  1. Insert Bottom Half: Place the bottom half of the magnet through the banner grommet hole from behind
  2. Secure Top Half: Screw the top half of the magnet onto the bottom half through the banner
  3. Attach to Surface: Position the assembled magnet against the steel surface for secure mounting

Installation on Non-Magnetic Surfaces

  1. Prepare Surface: Clean the mounting surface to ensure proper adhesive bonding
  2. Apply Mounting Plate: Remove adhesive backing and firmly press mounting plate to surface
  3. Attach Banner Magnet: Connect the assembled banner magnet to the mounted plate

Banner Requirements

  • Grommet Installation: Banner must have grommets installed for magnet attachment
  • Recommended Size: Optimal performance with banners up to 5 ft x 10 ft
  • Material Compatibility: Works with vinyl, fabric, mesh, and canvas banner materials
  • Grommet Spacing: Position magnets at corners and along edges for secure mounting

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Banner Magnets

How much weight can Banner Magnets hold?

Each Banner Magnet can securely hold up to 22 pounds, making them suitable for banners up to 5 ft x 10 ft when properly installed with adequate magnet placement.

Do Banner Magnets work on non-metal surfaces?

Yes, Banner Magnets include adhesive mounting plates that allow installation on non-magnetic surfaces such as walls, glass, and other smooth surfaces.

Can I reuse Banner Magnets for different installations?

Absolutely. Banner Magnets are designed for repeated use and can be easily removed and repositioned for different banner installations and locations.

What banner materials work with Banner Magnets?

Banner Magnets work with any grommeted banner material including vinyl banners, fabric banners, mesh banners, and canvas banners.

How many Banner Magnets do I need for my banner?

For most banners, use one magnet at each corner. Larger banners or high-wind areas may require additional magnets along the edges for optimal security.

Are Banner Magnets suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, Banner Magnets feature weather-resistant construction suitable for both indoor and outdoor banner installations.

How do I install Banner Magnets through banner grommets?

Insert the bottom half of the magnet through the grommet hole from behind the banner, then screw the top half onto the bottom half to secure the banner between the magnet pieces.

What's the difference between steel surface and non-magnetic surface installation?

On steel surfaces, Banner Magnets attach directly to the metal. On non-magnetic surfaces, you first install the included adhesive mounting plate, then attach the Banner Magnet to the plate.
